view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic response replay for duplicate requests.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic response replay for duplicate requests.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic response replay for duplicate requests.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Deterministic response replay for duplicate requests', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement was tested or satisfied. The linked use case describes a scenario where idempotency keys prevent duplicate bookings, yet there is no direct evidence from the current saga run that demonstrates this functionality was tested or confirmed. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
